name: Explore
tagline: Instant local experiences around you — Ireland first
description: A growing database of places across Ireland, each with one short “instant experience” drawn from public knowledge (food, drink, walks, deals, culture). Uses your location (or a shared pin) to rank nearby spots. Seeded data; designed for OSM and editorial expansion.

env_vars.description: Optional. Reserved for future LLM-assisted experience copy when ingesting new places.
